{{Quote|HA! ...like a squill in a barrel of Jawa beer! You're a card! Hope you don't get fried out there, my friend!|Kreezo|<ref name="SWG:JtL">''[[Star Wars Galaxies: Jump to Lightspeed]]''</ref>}}
'''Jawa beer''' was an [[Alcohol/Legends|alcoholic]] [[beer]] brewed by [[Jawa/Legends|Jawas]] on [[Tatooine/Legends|Tatooine]].

==Description==
[[Jawa/Legends|Jawa]] [[beer]] was considered a rough travel beer, brewed from fermented [[Grain/Legends|grains]] and [[Bantha/Legends|bantha]] [[Bantha hide/Legends|hide]]. The beer had a [[brown]]ish [[Color/Legends|colored]] hue.<ref name="SWG">{{GalaxiesAED}}</ref>

It was served in [[Cantina/Legends|cantinas]] on [[Tatooine/Legends|Tatooine]], and was also imported to other [[Planet/Legends|worlds]] across [[The galaxy/Legends|the galaxy]].<ref name="SWG" />

==Behind the scenes==
Jawa beer appeared in the [[2003]] [[Star Wars video games|video game]] [[Star Wars Galaxies|''Star Wars Galaxies: An Empire Divided'']], a [[Wikipedia:Massively multiplayer online role-playing game|massively multiplayer online roleplaying game]] developed by [[Sony]] Online Entertainment and published by [[LucasArts]]. The game was shut down on [[December 15]], [[2011]]. In the game, Jawa beer could be purchased from [[Bartender/Legends|bartenders]] in cantinas around the galaxy. It should be noted that the same graphical model for Jawa beer was used for other items in the game, such as [[fruit fizz]].<ref name="SWG" />
